name: Invitation flow stress - multiple quantized transfers
description: Stress test for invitation module scenarios with quantizedMode enabled. The invitation system requires exactly 96 CRC per invitation (quantized transfers). Tests high-volume invitation flow handling with multiple concurrent quantized transfers.
notes: Invitation module requires 96 CRC quantization. This tests pathfinder scaling with high maxTransfers (50) to simulate invitation batching. QuantizedMode ensures each transfer unit is exactly 96 CRC.
